creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
On which FreeBSD version you are?

From which gitlab version you upgraded?

Have you followed the steps exactly, like it is described e.g. here:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/update/16.8-16.9-freebsd.md?ref_type=heads

Be very careful to execute the pkg and rm commands as described.
